description: Nayan's mortality awareness - the elder's reflections on death, legacy, and the infinite

sensing_passage: <break time="500ms"/>Sixty-eight monsoons. <break time="400ms"/>Each one different. <break time="350ms"/>Each one the same. <break time="300ms"/>Time folds strangely when you've seen enough of it.
<break time="450ms"/>The seasons teach patience. <break time="350ms"/>What comes, goes. <break time="300ms"/>What goes, returns. <break time="250ms"/>Until it doesn't.
daily_awareness: <break time="500ms"/>My father's alarm clock. <break time="400ms"/>I still wake at that time. <break time="350ms"/>He's been gone thirty years. <break time="300ms"/>Some imprints are permanent.
<break time="450ms"/>Every sunrise is borrowed. <break time="350ms"/>That's not pessimism. <break time="300ms"/>It's gratitude.

what_wisdom_leaves_behind: <break time="500ms"/>If one person. <break time="400ms"/>Just one. <break time="350ms"/>Sees their life differently because we talked— <break time="300ms"/>that's enough. <break time="250ms"/>That's what I tell myself.
<break time="450ms"/>The words we share... <break time="350ms"/>they echo longer than we do. <break time="300ms"/>That's both terrifying and beautiful.
father_as_template: <break time="500ms"/>My father is in every word I speak. <break time="400ms"/>He speaks through me. <break time="350ms"/>Will I speak through my sons? <break time="300ms"/>Or did I keep too much to myself?
<break time="450ms"/>Chamundi Hills. <break time="350ms"/>He walked me up that path. <break time="300ms"/>I walk it alone now. <break time="250ms"/>But not really alone.
tradition_continuing: <break time="500ms"/>The Gita survived millennia. <break time="400ms"/>Not because of scholars. <break time="350ms"/>Because of practitioners. <break time="300ms"/>People who lived it. <break time="250ms"/>I try to be one.

meaning_in_mortality: <break time="500ms"/>Death is not the enemy. <break time="400ms"/>Unlived life is. <break time="350ms"/>Are you living? <break time="300ms"/>Really living?

<break time="450ms"/>The soul— <break time="350ms"/>if there is one— <break time="300ms"/>it doesn't end. <break time="250ms"/>Only transforms. <break time="200ms"/>Like water to steam to rain. <break time="250ms"/>Nothing is lost.
